import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { NewsListingPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <NewsListingPage
    serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    items={[
      {
        href: '/news/1',
        title: 'New office hours starting Meskerem',
        date: 'Meskerem 1, 2019 EC',
        summary: 'Government offices will open earlier starting next month.',
      },
      {
        href: '/news/2',
        title: 'Online passport renewal now available',
        date: 'Nehase 20, 2018 EC',
        summary: 'Renew your passport online without visiting an office.',
      },
    ]}
    page={1}
    totalPages={1}
    onPage={() => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

The paginated listing half of the News Page template — announcements and
news at a glance, with each entry's date rendered in a real `<time>`
element. See also [News Page — Article](news-article-page), the shape
each listing entry links to.

```tsx
import { NewsListingPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<NewsListingPage
  serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  items={items} // { href, title, date, summary }[]
  page={1}
  totalPages={3}
  onPage={(page) => { /* fetch that page */ }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this as the destination for a "Latest news" link (e.g. from the
[National Portal Homepage](national-portal-homepage)).

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`; dates use a real `<time>` element and are passed in already
  formatted per the
  [Ethiopian calendar](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/docs/localization/date-formatting.md).
- Paginated, never infinite-scrolled — predictable and
  [low-bandwidth](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/docs/design-principles/06-design-for-low-bandwidth.md)
  friendly.
- Every item's `title`/`summary` and pagination labels are translated
  content.

## Plain HTML

A real `<time datetime="…">` per item, reusing
[Pagination](/docs/components/pagination#plain-html)'s markup. See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/news-page.md#html-example)
(the "Listing" half) for the full page.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `items` | `NewsListItem[]` | Yes |
| `page` | `number` | Yes |
| `totalPages` | `number` | Yes |
| `onPage` | `(page: number) => void` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<NewsListingPageLabels>` | No |
